heading: Unsealed letters sent by blind or physically handicapped persons
label: 3404 Unsealed letters sent by blind or physically handicapped persons
text: Unsealed letters sent by a blind person or a person having a physical impairment, as described in , in raised characters or sightsaving type, or in the form of sound recordings, may be mailed free of postage.section 3403(a)(1) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective , pursuant to Resolution No. 71–9 of the Board of Governors. See , set out as a note preceding .July 1, 1971section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title
